description: Phase 40: Global Infrastructure & Edge Computing Package. Create packages/edge-computing/ with edge CDN compute, multi-region database replication, P2P content delivery, offline-first sync, and geo-routing.
steps: Create packages/edge-computing/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/sync-engine, @quant/storage, zod. Create packages/edge-computing/tsconfig.json extending root.
Create packages/edge-computing/src/types.ts - Type definitions for EdgeNode, EdgeFunction, CDNConfig, ReplicationConfig, P2PNode, GeoRoute, OfflineCache, ServiceWorkerConfig, ConflictResolution

Create packages/edge-computing/src/core/edge-functions.ts - EdgeFunctionRuntime class: deployFunction, invokeAtEdge, getEdgeNodes, routeToNearest, propagateUpdate, getLatencyMap, warmCache, purgeCache

Create packages/edge-computing/src/core/multi-region.ts - MultiRegionService class: configurReplication, resolveConflict, getRegionHealth, failover, getRegionLatency, syncRegions, getConsistencyStatus, promoteReplica
Create packages/edge-computing/src/core/p2p-network.ts - P2PNetwork class: joinSwarm, leaveSwarm, seedContent, requestContent, getPeers, getDownloadProgress, createMesh, broadcastMessage

Create packages/edge-computing/src/core/offline-first.ts - OfflineFirstEngine class: cacheRequest, serveFromCache, queueSync, processSyncQueue, registerServiceWorker, getOfflineCapability, reconcileChanges
Create packages/edge-computing/src/core/geo-routing.ts - GeoRoutingService class: resolveEndpoint, getOptimalRoute, configureGeoPolicy, getTrafficDistribution, setWeights, healthCheck, getDNSRecords
Create packages/edge-computing/src/__tests__/edge-functions.test.ts - Tests for edge deployment, routing, cache management
Create packages/edge-computing/src/__tests__/multi-region.test.ts - Tests for replication, conflict resolution, failover
Create packages/edge-computing/src/__tests__/offline-first.test.ts - Tests for caching, sync queue, reconciliation
acceptance_criteria: packages/edge-computing/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
EdgeFunctionRuntime deploys and invokes functions at edge nodes
MultiRegionService handles replication with conflict resolution
OfflineFirstEngine provides service worker caching with sync queues
GeoRoutingService routes traffic based on geography and health
All classes have comprehensive TypeScript types
Unit tests pass for edge functions, multi-region, and offline-first
pnpm typecheck passes for the package
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run packages/edge-computing/src/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
